name: Adnan
bio: I'm a passionate developer who loves building tools that blend artificial intelligence with practical, everyday workflows. My journey spans from crafting automated trading systems to exploring the frontier of AI-assisted development.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me researching market trends, experimenting with new AI models, or diving deep into system design. I believe the best technology is the kind that empowers people to do more with less friction.
Currently focused on building AI-powered tools and systems that make complex workflows accessible to everyone.
